artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a plain bulging brown paper envelope, unmarked and unsealed, lying half in a pool of amber lamplight on a worn card table, one corner foreshortened toward the viewer and faintly thick with hidden contents, its long shadow knifing across the wood into ink-black gloom. Cigar smoke drifts over it, a single highlight glints on the crease, loaded with quiet menace. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: The Brown Envelope
text:
When The Brown Envelope enters the battlefield, target opponent draws a card and you create a Favor token. Don't ask what's inside.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice The Brown Envelope: Draw a card. Some envelopes you open. This one you burn.
flavorText: Slid under the door. Unsigned. Understood.
